z-Generates all subsets of a set or sequence U.N)
z!Graph of n-dimensional hypercube.c
cube.<locals>.<listcomp>c
z#cube.<locals>.<listcomp>.<listcomp>rE
singletonsr)
cube
Graph, the vertices of which are edges of G,
    with two vertices being adjacent iff the corresponding
    edges share a vertex.c
linegraph.<locals>.<listcomp>c
	linegraph
r4q&|
rlq^|
q^q&q
